message:
feat(e2e): add E2E tests for ntm doctor command

Comprehensive test coverage for system diagnostics:
- Tool detection and health check validation
- Dependency verification (tmux, Go)
- Daemon port availability checks
- Configuration validation (.ntm, .beads directories)
- Design invariant checks
- JSON output format validation
- Overall status consistency verification
- Verbose mode testing
- Timestamp format validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
